fallback_description: Default content is rendered safely even when no data is available.
seo_home_description: A refined museum-style layout for exhibitions, artists, collections, and visitor information.
seo_exhibitions_description: Browse current, upcoming, and archived exhibitions with period and status details.
seo_artists_description: Introduce participating artists with portraits, short bios, and practice keywords.
seo_visit_description: Check opening hours, location, admission, and reservation links in one place.
seo_about_description: Introduce the curatorial stance, editorial tone, and operating posture of the space.
seo_collection_description: Present collection highlights with media groupings and short archival notes.
seo_news_description: Summarize announcements and program updates with clear dates and short summaries.
seo_press_description: Provide press releases, institutional copy, and media request guidance in an official tone.
seo_links_description: Gather reservations, official channels, archives, and partner destinations by intent.
seo_contact_description: Guide visitors to the right contact path for visits, collaborations, rentals, and materials.
